After turning right, my yaw changed from -60 to -30 degrees. The goal bearing is now +171 degrees, so the relative bearing is 171 - (-30) = 201 degrees, which wraps to -159 degrees (behind_left). The distance remained the same (2341 cm). Since the goal is behind_left, I need to turn left to align better with the goal direction before moving forward.
